name: npc-expression-sidecar-natural-prompt-fix
title: NPC expression sidecar natural prompt fix
description: Fix grouped NPC expression sidecar template so Final prompt contains only the neutral/natural single-image prompt, avoiding five-expression contact-sheet generation.
creator: lijin
notes: Completed 2026-05-03. Fixed grouped NPC expression sidecar template so ## Final prompt contains only the neutral/natural single-image prompt with explicit anti-contact-sheet guardrails. Regenerated public-welfare expression-set sidecars and updated docs/specs/skills. Focused tests and validator passed.

meta.root_cause: Grouped sidecar previously placed all five expression prompt blocks under ## Final prompt, so copying it into an image model could produce a five-expression contact sheet.
meta.fix: Use only neutral/natural expression prompt in ## Final prompt; keep other expressions as asset/hash provenance only.

verification.forbidden_prompt_scan: passed; no grouped sidecar contains joy/anger/embarrassment/curiosity prompt blocks
